hero.title: Comprehensive Music Industry Solutions
hero.description: We provide creators, labels, and brands with the technical infrastructure, distribution networks, and management expertise required to grow in today's digital landscape.

list.heading: Professional Capabilities
list.description: Explore our specialized services designed to protect your intellectual property, expand your reach, and optimize your catalog's revenue potential.

items.title: Music Distribution
items.description: Deliver your tracks, albums, and music videos directly to all major streaming platforms worldwide. We handle digital supply chain management, store onboarding, and automated metadata delivery.

items.title: YouTube Channel Management
items.description: Comprehensive channel administration including content upload schedules, metadata optimization, custom playlist creation, card/end-screen annotation, and direct fan engagement strategies.

items.title: Content Rights Management
items.description: Protect your content on global platforms. We monitor, enforce, and manage digital licensing agreements to ensure your copyrights are protected from unauthorized use and monetization.

items.title: YouTube CMS & Content ID
items.description: Audit and claim royalties across user-generated content (UGC) on YouTube. We configure matching policies, manage standard assets, resolve ownership conflicts, and maximize Content ID revenue.

items.title: OTT Distribution
items.description: Expand your reach onto over-the-top media platforms. We format and deliver video content to smart TV applications, streaming sticks, and digital television networks.

items.title: Revenue Optimization
items.description: Audit and streamline multi-channel payouts. We resolve payout discrepancies, optimize digital streams reporting, and consolidate mechanicals, performance, and sync licensing collection.

cta.heading: Ready to Optimize Your Music?
cta.description: Partner with us today. Reach out to get started with distribution, channel management, or rights auditing.

primaryCta.label: Get in Touch
primaryCta.ariaLabel: Get in touch — contact our services onboarding team
